variants.title: Mann Filter CU 4228 Cabin Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P785046
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER cabin filters offer almost 100% protection against particles such as pollen, diesel soot and tyre abrasion - for a feel-good climate in the vehicle interior and protection of the air conditioning system. Exact fit and perfect tightness ensure constant filtration performance during the entire service interval / Optimum vehicle interior ventilation due to the high air flow capacity.

variants.title: Donaldson P785046 Air Panel
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P785046 Air Panel is designed to provide reliable performance in air panel applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26139 Cabin Air Filter Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P785046
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF26139 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
